ValidationRule.description: Enforces that Metadata_Id__c is exactly 18 characters when populated. Blank values are allowed - the root dependency node is inserted without a Tooling API ID and has its Metadata_Id__c populated by the engine after the first callout resolves the component. The ISBLANK guard ensures the root node insert is not rejected. Do not disable - the two-tier cycle detection relies on all IDs being exactly 18 characters for delimiter-safe string containment checks.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When populated, Metadata ID must be exactly 18 characters. Blank is valid for root nodes only.
